summary: Business Settings and Content Center features fully tested. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified for both Business Settings page (logo/stamp upload, all 4 sections, save functionality) and Content Center page (regression - campaign chips, filters, preview drawer with copy captions).

issues: Logo and Stamp preview areas show placeholder text 'Company Logo' and 'Company Stamp / Seal' instead of actual images when paths are set but images don't exist at those paths. This is expected behavior but could show a broken image indicator.

critical_code_review_comments: AdminBusinessSettingsPage.jsx: ImageUploadField component correctly handles file upload with validation (image type, 5MB max), preview display, and clear functionality
AdminBusinessSettingsPage.jsx: All form fields have proper data-testid attributes for testing
business_settings_routes.py: DEFAULT_SETTINGS includes stamp_path and company_logo_path fields
business_settings_routes.py: PUT endpoint correctly filters payload to only allow DEFAULT_SETTINGS keys
business_settings_routes.py: /public endpoint returns stamp_url and logo_url for public access
file_routes.py: Upload endpoint supports folder=branding parameter for logo/stamp uploads
seed_data_creation: None - used existing business settings data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Business Settings page at /admin/business-settings fully functional with 4 sections (Business Identity, Contact Details, Banking Details, Document & Tax Settings). Logo and Stamp upload areas present with upload/replace buttons. All fields editable and save works with toast confirmation. Content Center at /admin/content-center continues to work correctly (regression verified).

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/business-settings: Returns all settings including company_logo_path and stamp_path (requires admin auth)
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/business-settings: Updates settings including stamp_path and company_logo_path (requires admin auth)
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/business-settings/public: Returns public business info including logo_url and stamp_url (no auth required)
backend_apis.POST /api/files/upload?folder=branding: File upload endpoint works for branding folder

frontend_ui.Business Settings page: Loads at /admin/business-settings with title and subtitle
frontend_ui.Business Identity section: Company Name, Trading Name, TIN, BRN, VRN fields - all editable
frontend_ui.Contact Details section: Email, Phone, Website, City, Address fields - all editable
frontend_ui.Banking Details section: Bank Name, Account Name, Account Number, Branch, SWIFT Code fields - all editable
frontend_ui.Document & Tax section: Currency, Default Tax Rate, Default Payment Terms, Payment Instructions, Document Note fields - all editable
frontend_ui.Company Logo upload: Upload area with Replace button, preview placeholder, file input (data-testid='logo-upload')
frontend_ui.Company Stamp upload: Upload area with Replace button, preview placeholder, file input (data-testid='stamp-upload')
frontend_ui.Save Settings button: Works correctly, shows 'Business settings saved' toast, button changes to 'Saved' state
frontend_ui.Content Center (regression): Campaign chips (HOLIDAY5K, LAUNCH2026), status/format filters, 200 content cards, preview drawer with download and copy caption buttons
